# AI Privacy Sanitizer

AI Privacy Sanitizer is a browser-based tool for LLM text sanitization and prompt safety.

Keywords:
- AI privacy filter
- LLM filter privacy data
- LLM filter sensitive data
- LLM text sanitization
- sanitize AI prompt
- sanitize LLM prompt

Primary URL:
- https://valeriyc.github.io/AIPrivacySanitizer/
